title: Quantum CDMA-based Continuous Variable Quantum Key Distribution using Chaotic Phase Shifters
summary: We present a quantum code-division multiple-access (q-CDMA) framework for multiuser continuous-variable quantum key distribution (CV-QKD) over a shared quantum channel. The proposed architecture employs chaotic phase shifters to encode and decode quantum states, enabling efficient multiplexing and d...
commentary: An interesting development in cryptography. This article from arXiv Quantum Physics covers recent progress that may have implications for the broader quantum computing field.
